notes: v2.1.207 (2026-07-11T00:52:10Z) ~23h after v2.1.206. Sizable release with ~25 load-bearing bullets and 3 BREAKING CHANGES. Load-bearing new primitives: (a) Auto mode default-on on Bedrock/Vertex AI/Foundry (no more CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_AUTO_MODE opt-in; disableAutoMode opt-out); (b) BREAKING: autoMode no longer read from .claude/settings.local.json (repo-resident) — use ~/.claude/settings.json instead (settings-config-fidelity migration); (c) BREAKING+SECURITY: plugin hooks/monitors/MCP headersHelper ${user_config.*} in shell-form commands rejected (shell-injection fix); migration to exec form (args array) or $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_OPTION_<KEY>; (d) BREAKING: pluginConfigs no longer read from project-level .claude/settings.json (user/--settings/managed only); (e) Bedrock/Vertex/Claude Platform on AWS default to Claude Opus 4.8; (f) remote managed settings from claude -p/SDK no longer permanently consented without dialog; (g) auto-updater no longer overwrites custom launcher at ~/.local/bin/claude (/doctor reports externally-managed); (h) extensions.worktreeConfig no longer leaked in .git/config after last worktree removal (breaking tea go-git tool interop); (i) malformed bracket patterns in rules globs/skill paths/.ignore/.worktreeinclude no longer break file reads+suggestions+worktree creation; (j) Remote Control mobile+web now show background-agent+workflow progress from desktop-hosted sessions; (k) Deep Research Fetch-phase agent chips now show source hostname (was 'unknown'); (l) Bedrock no longer repeatedly requests fresh AWS SSO credentials from IAM Identity Center per request; (m) 60s Windows AWS credential stall guard now fires (indefinite hang fix); (n) /usage-credits malformed-value rejection + $1000 typed confirmation; (o) crash-loop-in-agent-teams-on-malformed-teammate-mailbox fix. Feature-additive + 3-BREAKING-CHANGES; the breaking changes do NOT hit locked kit patterns (kit's CLAUDE.md.template doesn't ship .claude/settings.local.json-resident autoMode; kit's plugin templates don't ship ${user_config.*} shell-form). Severity ⚠. Extends v2.1.16x-v2.1.20x cluster architect-prompt slot to 15 workstream rows if promoted. Eleven-releases-in-eleven-days cadence (v2.1.197 07-01 → v2.1.207 07-11). Optional integration paths deferred to Monthly Integration: templates/claude-code/CLAUDE.md.template + templates/shared/AGENTS.md §Settings-Config-Fidelity two-bullet settings-config-fidelity slot (autoMode-in-~/.claude/settings.json + pluginConfigs project-settings deprecation); KB-06 §hosted-agent-safety plugin-shell-injection-hardening slot (${user_config.*} rejection + CLAUDE_PLUGIN_OPTION_<KEY> exec-form migration alongside 07-10 v2.1.206 EnterWorktree confirmation + /commit-push-pr push-to-configured-remote auto-allow + 07-08 v2.1.205 rm -rf-on-unresolved-variable guardrail + session-transcript-tampering-block cluster); KB-06 §default-behavior-and-plan-tier VPC-hosted-Claude default-behavior-shift slot (Auto-mode default-on + Opus 4.8 default-model); templates/claude-code/mcp.json.template plugin-MCP-headers-fidelity slot; templates/claude-code/CLAUDE.md.template §External-Launcher auto-updater-launcher-preservation slot. Aggregation candidate for Weekly Synthesis 2026-28.
